title: Christmas Tree Serving Trays, Red and Green Holiday Snack Dishes, 2-Piece Set, Festive Cookie and Treat Display Plates for Holiday Entertaining, Re-usable
features: FESTIVE DESIGN: Christmas tree-shaped serving trays in classic holiday colours of red and green with white trim, perfect for seasonal entertaining
VERSATILE STORAGE: Three-tiered compartments in each tray provide organised spaces for different snacks, sweets, and holiday treats
SET INCLUDES: Two complementary serving dishes - one red and one green Christmas tree-shaped tray with white borders
PRACTICAL SIZE: Each tray features graduated sections ideal for displaying and serving various party snacks and biscuits
HOLIDAY ENTERTAINING: Ideal for Christmas parties, festive gatherings, and seasonal displays of treats, biscuits, and confectionery
description: Add a festive touch to your holiday entertaining with this charming set of Re-Usable Christmas tree-shaped serving trays. The set includes two trays - one in classic Christmas red and one in holiday green, both featuring elegant white trim. These tiered serving dishes are perfect for displaying an assortment of Christmas treats, from cookies and chocolates to nuts and candies. The three-level design offers practical organisation while creating an eye-catching presentation that doubles as seasonal décor. Each tray's durable construction ensures reliable use throughout the holiday season, while the smooth interior makes cleaning simple. Whether you're hosting a Christmas party or arranging a delightful display of seasonal goodies, these festive trays bring both function and holiday cheer to your table setting. Their compact yet practical design makes them ideal for serving various snacks while maintaining the cheerful spirit of the season.

specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: Holiday Cookie Serving, Snacks, Crisps, Nuts
